title: selaginella sespillifolia
intro: Selaginella sespillifolia, also known as Spiny Spike Moss, is a type of terrestrial fern that belongs to the Selaginella genus and is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella sespillifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
